zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg於1176年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫賀利登霍恩格時，他的父親Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III28歲，母親Kunigunde von Grünberg31歲。他於大約1200年與Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1225年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg于1176年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫賀利登霍恩格时，他的父亲Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III28岁，母亲Kunigunde von Grünberg31岁。他于大约1200年与Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1225年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Burchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from burg ‘protection’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’; the name of an 8th-century saint, the first bishop of Würzburg.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg was born in 1176, in Hohenberg, Herrieden, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III, was 28 and his mother, Kunigunde von Grünberg, was 31. He married Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg about 1200. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1225, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg est né en 1176, à Hohenberg, Herrieden, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Grünberg, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1225, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg 1176 in Hohenberg, Herrieden, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III 28 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Grünberg 31. Er hat um 1200 Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1225 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg è nato il nel 1176 nel Hohenberg, Herrieden, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Grünberg, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1225, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Burchard IV von Hohenbergが1176年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチハーリーデンホーヘンバーグで生まれた時，父Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg IIIは28歳，母Kunigunde von Grünbergは31歳であった。約1200年にWilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1225年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg(이)가 1176년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 허리든 호헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Grünberg(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1225년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg nasceu em 1176, em Hohenberg, Herrieden, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Grünberg, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1225, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Burchard IV von Hohenberg родился в 1176 г. в местности хохенбирг, хирриеден, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Burkhard von Hohenberg III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Grünberg, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg около 1200 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1225 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Wilipirg Von Aichelberg Baroness Von Aichelberg aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1225, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
